Perfect for the little jobs other companies don't want to do.

RS Electrical is Ryan, direct — no office, no call centre, no job too small. One extra light, a dodgy switch, a full downlight fit-out: you get a straight answer and a fair price.

Why RS Electrical

Built for the jobs the big guys skip — and priced like it.

No minimum charge

One downlight, one power point, one weird noise from the switchboard — you're not forced into a bigger job to make it worth our time.

You deal with Ryan, not a call centre

You message the person who actually shows up and does the work. No account managers, no job getting handed down the chain.

Small jobs genuinely welcome

Recessed downlights, outdoor sensor lights, garage circuits, switchboard fiddly bits — the stuff that's easy to put off, we don't mind fitting in.

Local, flexible scheduling

Based in Southwest Sydney, so you're not paying travel time from the other side of the city or waiting three weeks for a slot.

Where we work

Southwest Sydney, corner to corner.

Not sure your suburb's on the list? Send a message — if it's a reasonable drive, we'll fit it in.

Campbelltown Camden Narellan Oran Park Gregory Hills Leppington Liverpool Casula Prestons Edmondson Park Ingleburn Minto + surrounding suburbs
Recent work
